Package com.rhlowery.acs.service

Interface UserService

All Known Implementing Classes:
DatabaseUserService
public interface UserService
Interface for user and group management, providing CRUD operations and persona assignments.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Resets the user and group store (primarily for testing).
    Optional<Group>
    getGroup(String groupId)
    Retrieves a specific group by its unique identifier.
    Optional<User>
    getUser(String userId)
    Retrieves a specific user by their unique identifier (email or username).
    List<Group>
    listGroups()
    Retrieves all defined groups and their associated metadata.
    List<User>
    listUsers()
    Retrieves all user profiles currently managed by the system.
    Group
    saveGroup(Group group)
    Persists or updates a group profile.
    User
    saveUser(User user)
    Persists or updates a user profile.
    Group
    updateGroupPersona(String groupId, String persona)
    Assigns or updates the system-wide persona for a specific group.
    User
    updateUserGroups(String userId, List<String> groups)
    Updates the list of associated groups for a specific user.
    User
    updateUserPersona(String userId, String persona)
    Assigns or updates the system-wide persona for a specific user.

  • Method Details

    • listUsers

      List<User> listUsers()
      Retrieves all user profiles currently managed by the system.
      Returns:
      List of all users.

    • listGroups

      List<Group> listGroups()
      Retrieves all defined groups and their associated metadata.
      Returns:
      List of all groups.

    • getUser

      Optional<User> getUser(String userId)
      Retrieves a specific user by their unique identifier (email or username).
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user
      Returns:
      Optional containing the user if found, empty otherwise

    • getGroup

      Optional<Group> getGroup(String groupId)
      Retrieves a specific group by its unique identifier.
      Parameters:
      groupId - The unique identifier of the group
      Returns:
      Optional containing the group if found, empty otherwise

    • updateUserGroups

      User updateUserGroups(String userId, List<String> groups)
      Updates the list of associated groups for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user
      groups - List of new group IDs to assign
      Returns:
      The updated User object

    • updateUserPersona

      User updateUserPersona(String userId, String persona)
      Assigns or updates the system-wide persona for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user
      persona - The persona ID to assign
      Returns:
      The updated User object

    • updateGroupPersona

      Group updateGroupPersona(String groupId, String persona)
      Assigns or updates the system-wide persona for a specific group.
      Parameters:
      groupId - The unique identifier of the group
      persona - The persona ID to assign
      Returns:
      The updated Group object

    • saveUser

      User saveUser(User user)
      Persists or updates a user profile.
      Parameters:
      user - The user object to save
      Returns:
      The saved User object

    • saveGroup

      Group saveGroup(Group group)
      Persists or updates a group profile.
      Parameters:
      group - The group object to save
      Returns:
      The saved Group object

    • clear

      void clear()
      Resets the user and group store (primarily for testing).
